title: Principal Instructional Designer at Adda247 Global Group

jsonLd.title: Principal Instructional Designer at Adda247 Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Adda247 Global Group, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Varanasi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Adda247 Global Group:
Adda247 Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adda247 Global Group!
